_publications._publicationTitle: Nf2/Merlin controls spinal cord neural progenitor function in a Rac1/ErbB2-dependent manner.

_contextSnippet: While normal spinal cord autopsy specimens from individuals ranging from 2 weeks to 14 years of age lacked ErbB2 activation, the two human NF2-patient ependymoma samples exhibited robust phospho-ErbB2 expression
details: Showed robust phospho-ErbB2 expression in human NF2-patient ependymoma samples while normal spinal cord lacked ErbB2 activation
